stories.name: Add pagination to audit trail table
stories.description: The audit trail table in YourProject currently loads all records. Add server-side pagination with configurable page size.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• Table shows 25 records per page by default
  • Page size selector: 10, 25, 50, 100
  • Next/Prev/First/Last buttons
  • Total record count displayed
stories.frontend: Use PrimeNG p-table with lazy loading. Add paginator component below table.
stories.backend: Add page/size query params to GET /api/audit-trail. Return total count in response header.
stories.qa: Test with 1000+ records. Verify page navigation, size changes, and filter resets page to 1.

stories.name: Fix environment selector not persisting across sessions
stories.description: When a user selects a dev environment, the choice is lost on page refresh. Should persist in localStorage.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• Selected environment persists in localStorage
  • On load, reads from storage and preselects
  • Clear button resets to default
stories.frontend: Read/write environment key to localStorage in the environment-selector component.
stories.qa: Select env, refresh page, verify selection persists. Clear storage, verify default.

stories.name: Implement dark mode for admin dashboard
stories.description: Add a dark mode toggle to the admin dashboard. Use CSS custom properties for theming.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• Toggle in header switches light/dark
  • Preference saved to user profile
  • All admin pages support both themes
  • Charts and graphs adapt colors
stories.frontend: Create theme service with CSS custom properties. Update all SCSS files to use variables.
stories.backend: Add theme_preference column to user_settings table. New PUT /api/user/preferences endpoint.
stories.qa: Test all admin pages in both modes. Check contrast ratios meet WCAG AA.

stories.name: Add bulk action support to content manager
stories.description: Content editors need to select multiple items and apply actions (publish, archive, delete) in bulk.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• Checkbox column for row selection
  • Select all / deselect all
  • Bulk publish, archive, delete actions
  • Confirmation dialog before destructive actions
stories.frontend: Add selection state to content-list component. Bulk action toolbar appears when items selected.
stories.backend: New POST /api/content/bulk-action endpoint accepting array of IDs and action type.
stories.qa: Test with 50+ items selected. Verify partial failures show individual errors.

stories.name: Upgrade Angular to v19
stories.description: Upgrade YourProject frontend from Angular 18 to Angular 19. Update all dependencies and fix breaking changes.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• All unit tests pass
  • All e2e tests pass
  • No console errors or warnings
  • Bundle size does not increase by more than 5%
stories.frontend: Run ng update. Fix deprecated APIs. Update third-party libs.
stories.qa: Full regression test of all modules. Compare bundle sizes before/after.

stories.name: Add real-time notifications via WebSocket
stories.description: Replace polling-based notification system with WebSocket push for instant updates.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• WebSocket connection established on login
  • Notifications appear within 1s of event
  • Graceful fallback to polling if WS unavailable
  • Connection auto-reconnects on drop
stories.frontend: Create WebSocket service with reconnect logic. Update notification component to use push.
stories.backend: Add SignalR hub for notifications. Broadcast on content publish, user mention, system alert.
stories.qa: Test with network throttling. Verify reconnect. Load test with 100 concurrent connections.

stories.name: Fix media library upload failing for files over 10MB
stories.description: Large file uploads to the media library fail silently. Need chunked upload support.
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• Files up to 500MB upload successfully
  • Progress bar shows upload percentage
  • Resume on network interruption
stories.frontend: Implement chunked upload in media-upload component. Show progress bar.
stories.backend: Add chunked upload endpoint. Reassemble chunks on completion. Store in blob storage.
stories.qa: Test 10MB, 100MB, 500MB files. Kill network mid-upload and verify resume.

stories.name: Create deployment pipeline for Kubernetes migration
stories.description: Set up CI/CD pipeline for deploying YourProject to AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service).
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
• Dockerfile builds and runs locally
  • Helm chart deploys to AKS dev cluster
  • Pipeline triggers on PR merge to master
  • Health checks and rollback on failure
stories.backend: Create Dockerfile, Helm chart, and Azure Pipeline YAML.
stories.qa: Deploy to staging. Run smoke tests. Verify rollback on failed health check.
